textByHashes.aa0da9f92a61ba83dd5e3081af36413856f3bd1c: Not so good. It's great to see you're helping us out though.
textByHashes.51c31f888e3613e21547f3c1ec68cd2460b75207: Okay. Thanks for letting me know. I'll tell Radigad.
textByHashes.420a449fba3e93005ae21157276522f172983bec: Don't worry, I'm just getting my stuff together before leaving. Good luck with your trip to the temple.
textByHashes.6cfb057aadb56a3e96fc5e8809d8eb289317effe: Hey there. It's great of you to do all this work for Veliaf. I've heard him say some good things about you. Keep up the good work and I'm sure you'll be invited to become a full member of the Myreque!
textByHashes.e695bb6b62fc398e181e0cae669a5488ef7a26e7: Hello there. Here to help the cause are you? Speak to Veliaf. He'll sort you out.
textByHashes.088a2ec2887ecabc008a5c638ed7d77e49b1c1d1: Ah, I see you've introduced yourself to Veliaf. Now, what can I do for you?
textByHashes.6c68eafb811fad4d544c55fff1718179a5ac36dd: Not at all. I'm sure I'll be able to help.
textByHashes.5c059b08f47986651097efd3bab8b8d8efc600c7: I'm a key advisor to Veliaf. He seeks my council on many issues before we engage the enemy. Not that we do that very often. Our foes heavily outnumber us.
textByHashes.943ea21c90cf238254163637e4ea8c77ef5b3bd9: We don't give up though. After all, all that is required for evil to survive is for good people to do nothing.
textByHashes.6bbc074372e335ac9e4223a4fc4e53db3386167f: Well there's multiple groups of us. Even we don't know exactly how many. The less we know about our allies, the less we can reveal to the vampyres if captured.
textByHashes.8759889efc02689fc0a7698188a0ac0969e62179: Veliaf leads this group. We operate throughout Mort Myre and the surrounding villages. He reports to Calsidiu who is the head of our resistance.
textByHashes.9074269ddd854f6b2cd0c8d7039ff2bbe12c703e: All the land on this side of the Salve is known as Morytania. Humans and vampyres are the main occupants of the region, though other races also live out here.
textByHashes.26e844124941de48ebbba59a300df990d815f53f: The humans here live like cattle with the vampyres taking regular blood tithes to keep themselves fed. All in all, it's a dire place. Though we hope to change that.
textByHashes.061459505f08f9a1b69883759fc3745c94c40dc2: Yes, I hear them all the time. They're neither correct or even all that interesting though.
textByHashes.bf7470fdc83a3743aa6c89c8d54bb1d599b67799: This is a dark day for the Myreque.
textByHashes.4dacdfdb65298a713f9ff80acec68cbe22b3f332: Don't worry. No one blames you. You were tricked and that's that. It serves no useful purpose to blame any of ourselves for this.
textByHashes.3b0b4cd4122cd222ce4aaeae1a10f292e997cf49: Hello there. Have you spoken to Veliaf and Safalaan?
textByHashes.227a11045bac1433a9263076539fa7a56e562430: Ah, probably best that you do. That vampyre could arrive at any moment.
textByHashes.f5de30115814dbc9bb681e6fa41719891b036039: But then your brother came along.
textByHashes.388ade915daff67f4f028524e0bc7da8342c23a6: You should be keeping an eye on Safalaan and Vanescula. We will talk later.
textByHashes.130aad31096955d05d0a6cc62e590db2b8a263f3: Hello there. I hope Vanescula isn't causing trouble.
textByHashes.ccc61e35046b0cafa49b888a2849199e39764ff0: Oh dear. I fear she is trying to manipulate him.
textByHashes.3c6430d067ac5799ce4fad21b38a7525c66dc111: Vanescula does not strike me as someone that fails to consider every detail of a plan. However, you must have spotted the clear holes in this scheme to kill her brother.
textByHashes.22f551b6c92ad79cfc7c850117f273e019186f73: Her plan detailed getting us in and killing her brother. But there was no mention of getting us out again. We'll have just killed the ruler of Morytania. To the vampyres, we'll be public enemy number one.
textByHashes.0b47052bf6c3222c2f0a4ab76e53a736a7bdda2c: If you ask me, I reckon that Vanescula will kill us all as soon as her brother is out of the picture.
textByHashes.12e13cb6d73202dbaa3d9cbad51186591a34d4c4: I'm afraid not. Killing Lowerniel Drakan is no victory at all if he just gets replaced with his sister. Especially if it results in our demise.
textByHashes.b30cbe5970fe95fbd01ee41e4aaf018d42d6b52d: An interesting proposal. Do you think we can do it?
textByHashes.f222f4518884be611dd02ae7f475039154f8ad2e: A fair point. And I guess if we can't kill Lowerniel, what does it matter at that point. We'll all be dead.
textByHashes.caf360145a1f88bdaa84e95f13a4c230138d3934: I still fear it's a trap. But perhaps our best move now is to spring that trap. You've convinced me. I will support Safalaan.
textByHashes.94aa752723deaeeb3b93d43aa2b348cf37867026: Hello there. Have you convinced the others to work with Vanescula?
textByHashes.28714c5a4f778a382171bab70f1dbea47a15546c: Maybe. I guess we'll find out soon enough. Be careful out there.
textByHashes.dc53a1039ef02ec73cb1b476cf5a627c4d45de45: That's a good idea. Do you have a vyrewatch disguise with you?
textByHashes.00c6d275e2f0c2dd9e1bb65f28e6bf107975b61e: Great. Hand it over and I'll get to work.
textByHashes.f1c9e010381488cbb12dc4364de70500d5987e41: Here's your finished disguise. Be careful out there.
textByHashes.cfa689358a207d448b2e84457408e096d50b6e65: There was enough material for some spares. I'll leave them in the chest in the corner in case you need more.
textByHashes.fe22cde2f4fdfe9157c074fc6498eac3a4f14f86: Well I can't make your new disguise until you give it to me.
textByHashes.c427c88ee2dc870e750598848c9461fb168e5180: Good to see you . How are things going?
textByHashes.0ef24d68c79659062e021f3b3ed5d4c022d48af1: Well that's good to hear. Anything I can help with?
textByHashes.77407a532b1493530f4491716f02bedd3bfab664: The city of Darkmeyer? Oh my! You'd better be careful.
textByHashes.737c45186e0865bb9864d776841e4930798f983d: Anyhow, yes I should be able to help. What kind of disguise do you need?
textByHashes.52d1b3cb6fff3416667b72098465cca19e72dc0e: Hello there. Do you have a vyrewatch disguise yet?
textByHashes.2bfb41cecd88774a2fc729935ef21b96294f147c: I'll be here once you have.
textByHashes.edc952053c1e4f867ea7ed73e5ac1364e5a1507f: Hey there. It's brilliant that you've been made into a full member of the Myreque!
textByHashes.94d0e51798c5544d36a1f4a2ed3c8c8672cae990: Keep up the good work, I'm sure Veliaf appreciates it.
textByHashes.99683d59dcf120ff595747f583fd80c2ee0c7ab8: He's out on business. Don't worry, he knows how to take care of himself.
